name: Curse of the Drake
description:
A particularly fat statue of a dragon inflicts a terrible curse on you...
---

This bot contains:

  • Dragon Transformation (TF)

  • Weight Gain

    As requested, a dragon transformation bot. Did my own spin on it, but if the weight gain aspect isn't wanted, it should be easy enough to avoid that paths. Sorry for those who wanted a more 'traditional' transformation! Image nabbed from an Etsy creator...

    As an aside - I'll take requests from here on out. No promises I'll get to all of them, but I'll do my best to fulfill them :)
creator: Radabada
